extortion.description: OceanFish is a leading company in Romania since 1998, specializing in the import, processing, and distribution of fish products. Their offerings include fresh, frozen, prepared seafood, sushi, and canned products, catering primarily to the HORECA sectorWe will upload 10gb of corporate data soon.Employee personal information, financials, payment details, project files, partners info, internal confidential files and so on.
